# Fix 21.1.1 — correctifs vs 21.1.0

> Correctifs livrés par le patch `21.1.1` (publié le 2026-03-03). La documentation de cette skill (`references/`) reflète le **dernier** patch de la mineure : si votre projet est sur un patch **antérieur** à `21.1.1`, les correctifs ci-dessous ne sont **pas** dans votre version.
> Storybook exact de ce patch : https://lucca-front.lucca.io/v21.1.1/storybook

## API (diff structurel)

### box

+ (output) `killed` : void

### bubble-illustration

~ `illustration` : BubbleIllustration → BubbleIllustration | string

### button

~ `palette` : 'success' | 'warning' | 'error' | 'product' | 'neutral' | 'none' | 'primary' | 'grey' → 'success' | 'warning' | 'error' | 'product' | 'neutral' | 'none' | 'primary' | 'grey' | 'brand'

### section-empty-state

~ `illustration` : BubbleIllustration | null → BubbleIllustration | string | null

### software-icon

~ `icon` : // Time and Activities
	'absences' | 'timesheet' | 'office' | 'projects' | 'planning' | // Talent Management
	'perfomance' | 'engagement' | 'training' | 'recruitment' | // Employee Administration
	'analytics' | 'employee-administration' | 'shared-documents' | // Spend Management
	'business-expenses' | 'invoices' | 'payment-methods' | 'accounting-assistant' | // Compensation and Benefits
	'compensation' | 'payslip' | 'benefits' | 'payroll-assistant' | // Lucca
	'mood' | 'faces' | 'administration' | 'cloud-control' | 'lucca' → // Time and Activities
	'absences' | 'timesheet' | 'office' | 'projects' | 'shifts' | // Talent Management
	'performance' | 'engagement' | 'training' | 'recruitment' | 'mood' | // Employee Administration
	'analytics' | 'employee-administration' | 'shared-documents' | 'faces' | // Spend Management
	'business-expenses' | 'invoices' | 'payment-methods' | 'accounting-assistant' | // Compensation and Benefits
	'compensation' | 'payslip' | 'benefits' | 'payroll-assistant' | // Lucca

	'administration' | 'cloud-control' | 'lucca'


## Stories (sources)

Diff complet des sources de stories (`stories/`) entre `v21.1.0` et `v21.1.1`. Les suppressions embarquent le contenu supprimé.

````diff
diff --git a/stories/documentation/forms/data-presentation/angular/basic.stories.ts b/stories/documentation/forms/data-presentation/angular/basic.stories.ts
new file mode 100644
index 000000000..dd675e8c0
--- /dev/null
+++ b/stories/documentation/forms/data-presentation/angular/basic.stories.ts
@@ -0,0 +1,18 @@
+import { DataPresentationComponent } from '@lucca-front/ng/form-field';
+import { Meta, StoryObj } from '@storybook/angular';
+
+export default {
+	title: 'Documentation/Forms/Data Presentation/Angular/Basic',
+	component: DataPresentationComponent,
+	render: (args, context) => {
+		return {
+			template: `<lu-data-presentation label="label">Value</lu-data-presentation>`,
+		};
+	},
+} as Meta;
+
+export const Template: StoryObj<DataPresentationComponent> = {
+	argTypes: {},
+
+	args: {},
+};
diff --git a/stories/documentation/forms/data-presentation/html&css/basic.stories.ts b/stories/documentation/forms/data-presentation/html&css/basic.stories.ts
new file mode 100644
index 000000000..cd99df452
--- /dev/null
+++ b/stories/documentation/forms/data-presentation/html&css/basic.stories.ts
@@ -0,0 +1,21 @@
+import { Meta, StoryObj } from '@storybook/angular';
+
+export default {
+	title: 'Documentation/Forms/Data Presentation/HTML&CSS/Basic',
+} as Meta;
+
+function getTemplate(): string {
+	return `<dl class="presentation">
+	<dt class="presentation-term">label</dt>
+	<dd class="presentation-definition">Value</dd>
+</dl>`;
+}
+
+const Template = () => ({
+	template: getTemplate(),
+});
+
+export const Basic: StoryObj = {
+	args: {},
+	render: Template,
+};

diff --git a/stories/documentation/intl/intl.stories.ts b/stories/documentation/intl/intl.stories.ts
new file mode 100644
index 000000000..c7d193526
--- /dev/null
+++ b/stories/documentation/intl/intl.stories.ts
@@ -0,0 +1,39 @@
+import { Meta, StoryObj } from '@storybook/angular';
+
+import { ChangeDetectionStrategy, Component, input } from '@angular/core';
+import { PaginationComponent } from '@lucca-front/ng/pagination';
+
+@Component({
+	selector: 'lu-intl-story',
+	imports: [PaginationComponent],
+	template: ` <lu-pagination [from]="0" [to]="10" [itemsCount]="1000" [intl]="{ results: resultIntl() }" /> `,
+	changeDetection: ChangeDetectionStrategy.OnPush,
+})
+export class IntlStory {
+	resultIntl = input('Dépenses de {{from}} à {{to}} sur {{itemsCount}}');
+}
+
+export default {
+	title: 'Documentation/Intl/Basic',
+	component: IntlStory,
+} as Meta;
+
+export const Basic: StoryObj<IntlStory> = {
+	parameters: {
+		controls: {
+			include: ['resultIntl'],
+		},
+		docs: {
+			source: {
+				language: 'ts',
+				type: 'code',
+				code: `<lu-pagination [from]="0" [to]="10" [itemsCount]="1000" [intl]="{ results: resultIntl }" />`,
+			},
+		},
+	},
+	argTypes: {
+		resultIntl: {
+			control: 'text',
+		},
+	},
+};

diff --git a/stories/qa/software-icon/software-icon.stories.html b/stories/qa/software-icon/software-icon.stories.html
new file mode 100644
index 000000000..961a3d8f7
--- /dev/null
+++ b/stories/qa/software-icon/software-icon.stories.html
@@ -0,0 +1,65 @@
+<table class="demo-QAtable">
+	<tbody>
+		<tr>
+			<td></td>
+			<td>
+				<div class="demo-QAtable-list">HTML</div>
+			</td>
+			<td>
+				<div class="demo-QAtable-list">Angular</div>
+			</td>
+		</tr>
+		<tr>
+			<td>Default</td>
+			<td>
+				<div class="demo-QAtable-list">
+					@for (softwareIcon of softwareIconList; track softwareIcon) {
+						<div
+							class="softwareIcon"
+							aria-hidden="true"
+							[innerHtml]="'https://cdn.lucca.fr/transverse/prisme/visuals/software-icon/' + softwareIcon + '.svg' | luSafeExternalSvg"
+						></div>
+					}
+				</div>
+			</td>
+			<td>
+				<div class="demo-QAtable-list">
+					@for (softwareIcon of softwareIconList; track softwareIcon) {
+						<lu-software-icon [icon]="softwareIcon" />
+					}
+				</div>
+			</td>
+		</tr>
+		<tr>
+			<td>Disabled</td>
+			<td>
+				<div class="demo-QAtable-list"></div>
+			</td>
+			<td>
+				<div class="demo-QAtable-list">
+					@for (softwareIcon of softwareIconList; track softwareIcon) {
+						<lu-software-icon [icon]="softwareIcon" disabled />
+					}
+				</div>
+			</td>
+		</tr>
+		<tr>
+			<td>Size</td>
+			<td>
+				<div class="demo-QAtable-list"></div>
+			</td>
+			<td>
+				<div class="demo-QAtable-list">
+					<lu-software-icon [icon]="'invoices'" size="XXS" />
+					<lu-software-icon [icon]="'absences'" size="XS" />
+					<lu-software-icon [icon]="'payslip'" size="S" />
+					<lu-software-icon [icon]="'benefits'" />
+					<lu-software-icon [icon]="'office'" size="L" />
+				</div>
+			</td>
+		</tr>
+	</tbody>
+</table>
+
+<!-- To tell the ui-diff tool that the page has finished rendering -->
+<span id="ready"></span>
diff --git a/stories/qa/software-icon/software-icon.stories.ts b/stories/qa/software-icon/software-icon.stories.ts
new file mode 100644
index 000000000..d95aba865
--- /dev/null
+++ b/stories/qa/software-icon/software-icon.stories.ts
@@ -0,0 +1,31 @@
+import { ChangeDetectionStrategy, Component } from '@angular/core';
+import { LuSafeExternalSvgPipe } from '@lucca-front/ng/safe-content';
+import { SoftwareIconComponent, SoftwareIconList } from '@lucca-front/ng/software-icon';
+import { Meta, StoryObj, moduleMetadata } from '@storybook/angular';
+
+@Component({
+	selector: 'software-icon-stories',
+	templateUrl: './software-icon.stories.html',
+	imports: [SoftwareIconComponent, LuSafeExternalSvgPipe],
+	changeDetection: ChangeDetectionStrategy.OnPush,
+})
+class SoftwareIconStory {
+	softwareIconList = SoftwareIconList;
+}
+
+export default {
+	title: 'QA/SoftwareIcon',

+import { ChangeDetectionStrategy, Component } from '@angular/core';
+import { FormControl, FormsModule, ReactiveFormsModule } from '@angular/forms';
+import { FormFieldComponent } from '@lucca-front/ng/form-field';
+import { Meta } from '@storybook/angular';
+import { DurationPickerComponent, TimePickerComponent } from '@lucca-front/ng/time';
+
+@Component({
+	selector: 'time-stories',
+	templateUrl: './time.stories.html',
+	imports: [DurationPickerComponent, FormFieldComponent, FormsModule, ReactiveFormsModule, TimePickerComponent],
+	changeDetection: ChangeDetectionStrategy.OnPush,
+})
+class TimeStory {
+	emptyDuration = null;
+	filledDuration = 'PT1H';
+	emptyDurationControl = new FormControl(null);
+	filledDurationControl = new FormControl('PT1H');
+	filledDuration1000hControl = new FormControl('PT1000H');
+	emptyTime = null;
+	filledTime = '12:30:00';
+	emptyTimeControl = new FormControl(null);
+	filledTimeControl = new FormControl('12:30:00');
+}
+
+export default {
+	title: 'QA/Time',
+	component: TimeStory,
+} as Meta;
+
+export const Basic = {};
````
